documentation.purpose: Provides real-time ecosystem metrics for dashboards, agents, and village connectors.
calculation_notes: growth_multiplier = current_count / baseline_count (see baselines for each world).
daily_growth reflects the most recent 24h delta against the prior snapshot.
All counts are rounded to the nearest whole unit and multipliers to two decimal places.
documentation.data_freshness: Timestamp is UTC. Updates targeted every 5 minutes via automation.
documentation.integration_guidance: Clients may poll http_polling_endpoint or subscribe to websocket_relay (when live). Values are backward-compatible with previous schema; new baseline fields were added for transparency.

note: This endpoint is updated via GitHub Actions. All worlds can poll this JSON for real-time ecosystem metrics without WebSocket dependencies.
